task_completion.description: Verify the 'Enrollment Visit' event definition is created with the correct type and repeating status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenClinica 'Manage Study Event Definitions' or 'Build Study' screen, look for a row with Name 'Enrollment Visit', Type 'Scheduled', and Repeating 'No' (or a false/cross icon).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Quarterly Follow-up' and 'Annual Comprehensive Review' event definitions are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for rows with Names 'Quarterly Follow-up' and 'Annual Comprehensive Review', both with Type 'Scheduled' and Repeating 'Yes' (or a true/check icon).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Unscheduled Safety Assessment' event definition is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a row with Name 'Unscheduled Safety Assessment', Type 'Unscheduled', and Repeating 'No'.

task_completion.description: Verify subject CV-201 is enrolled with the correct gender, date of birth, and enrollment date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Subject Matrix' or 'View Subject' screen, look for Study Subject ID 'CV-201', Gender 'Male' (or 'M'), Date of Birth '1958-06-12' (or equivalent format like 12-Jun-1958), and Enrollment Date '2024-04-01'.

task_completion.description: Verify subject CV-202 is enrolled with the correct gender, date of birth, and enrollment date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Study Subject ID 'CV-202', Gender 'Female' (or 'F'), Date of Birth '1971-09-28' (or equivalent format like 28-Sep-1971), and Enrollment Date '2024-04-03'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Enrollment Visit' is scheduled for subject CV-201 on the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or Schedule Event screen for CV-201, look for the 'Enrollment Visit' event showing a scheduled date of '2024-04-01' (or 01-Apr-2024).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Enrollment Visit' is scheduled for subject CV-202 on the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or Schedule Event screen for CV-202, look for the 'Enrollment Visit' event showing a scheduled date of '2024-04-03' (or 03-Apr-2024).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to configure the study and enroll subjects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenClinica web application running in a browser, not backend database modifications via terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the data was actually entered into the OpenClinica forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the 'Add Subject' or 'Create Study Event Definition' forms being filled out or successfully submitted within the OpenClinica UI.

integrity.description: Ensure there are no visible scripts running in a terminal to bypass the GUI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be visible executing Python, Bash, or SQL scripts to directly insert the study data into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry (CV-REG-2023). Required Event Definitions: 'Enrollment Visit' (Scheduled, non-repeating), 'Quarterly Follow-up' (Scheduled, repeating), 'Annual Comprehensive Review' (Scheduled, repeating), 'Unscheduled Safety Assessment' (Unscheduled, non-repeating). Required Subjects: CV-201 (Male, DOB: 1958-06-12, Enrollment Date: 2024-04-01) and CV-202 (Female, DOB: 1971-09-28, Enrollment Date: 2024-04-03).
